name: clay
description: Editor support for Clay annotation markers in reference projects.

editor/context.when: editorLangId == dart || editorLangId == shellscript || editorLangId == yaml || editorLangId == html || editorLangId == xml || editorLangId == markdown || editorLangId == ignore
editorLangId == dart || editorLangId == shellscript || editorLangId == yaml || editorLangId == html || editorLangId == xml || editorLangId == markdown || editorLangId == ignore

clay.cliPath.markdownDescription: Path to the `clay` CLI executable. When empty, the extension searches `PATH`, the Dart install bin directory, and the pub-cache bin directory. Install with `dart pub global activate clay_cli` after release, or use `dart run` against the workspace package during development.

clay.colors.remove.markerForeground.markdownDescription: Foreground color for remove, drop, and remove-boundary annotation markers.

clay.colors.remove.contentBackground.markdownDescription: Background tint for content removed at generation time (remove blocks and drop tails).

clay.colors.replace.withMarkerForeground.markdownDescription: Foreground color for the `with` marker inside replace blocks.

clay.colors.replace.originalBackground.markdownDescription: Background tint for scaffold content replaced at generation time.

clay.colors.replace.replacementBackgroun.markdownDescription: Background tint for replacement content kept after generation.

clay.colors.insert.markerForeground.markdownDescription: Foreground color for insert-block boundary markers.

clay.colors.insert.contentBackground.markdownDescription: Background tint for content inserted at generation time.

clay.colors.partial.markerForeground.markdownDescription: Foreground color for partial-block boundary markers.

clay.colors.partial.payloadBackground.markdownDescription: Background tint for partial payload extracted to a `.partial` file.

clay.colors.mustache.tagForeground.markdownDescription: Foreground color for Mustache variable tags inside annotation comments.

clay.colors.mustache.commentBackground.markdownDescription: Background tint for Mustache tag spans in annotation comments.

clay.colors.mustache.dropFlagForeground.markdownDescription: Foreground color for `x` whitespace-control flags on Mustache tags.

clay.colors.spacing.markerForeground.markdownDescription: Foreground color for spacing-group (`w … w`) markers.

clay.colors.spacing.markerBackground.markdownDescription: Background tint for spacing-group marker spans.

scripts.test: node test/build-helpers.mjs && node --test test/smoke.test.mjs test/annotationConfig.test.mjs test/annotationPairing.test.mjs test/mustacheHighlighting.test.mjs test/clayConfig.test.mjs test/brickScope.test.mjs test/clayCli.test.mjs test/previewRunner.test.mjs test/brickVariables.test.mjs test/previewFileVariables.test.mjs test/previewVariableState.test.mjs test/rangeUtils.test.mjs test/supportedFiles.test.mjs test/highlighting.test.mjs test/blockFolding.test.mjs test/annotationConfigReader.test.mjs test/variableQuickPick.test.mjs test/previewCommand.test.mjs test/annotationHighlighting.test.mjs
